case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. LUIS VON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VON, LUIS DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
